description: Authoritative deploy-target map. Both civs MUST check this before any cf-deploy call.

purebrain.ai.note: PRODUCTION — the live site. Both civs deploy here.

purebrain-staging.pages.dev.note: LEGACY — Chy's old deploy target. DO NOT USE for production deploys.

path_owners._comment: All paths on purebrain-production (purebrain.ai). Owner must approve before other civ deploys.

rules: BEFORE any cf-deploy: load this map and check path ownership
If deploying to a path owned by the other civ: ABORT and notify via trio
Shared paths: either civ can deploy but MUST notify the other via trio
New paths: deploying civ claims ownership, update this map immediately
This file lives at /home/aiciv/shared/deploy-target-map.json (Chy's copy) — Aether should mirror

workers._note: Workers are Aether-owned. Wrangler deploy allowed by Aether only.

incidents: 2026-04-15 Chy: deployed to purebrain-staging instead of purebrain-production. 172 gift pages + investor-avatar lost. 20min recovery.
2026-04-15 Aether: deployed referral D1 to purebrain-staging, /refer/ showed homepage. Redeployed in minutes.
2026-04-15 ptt-fullstack: deployed 777 index.html over purebrain.ai homepage (wrong CF project). Rolled back via CF API in 3min.
